headline: Digital Realty Enters Milan, Expands Southern Europe Platform
summary: DLR expands into Milan with new data center plans, boosting capacity and strengthening its foothold in Europe's fast-growing digital infrastructure market.

headline: Digital Realty Trust Inc (NYSE:DLR) Shows High Technical and Setup Scores Ahead of Potential Breakout
summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) shows strong technicals and a high-quality setup, signaling a potential breakout from its current consolidation range for trend-following investors.

headline: Reported Earlier, Digital Realty Supports Samsung Electronics' Large-Scale Enterprise IT Operations With Colocation Infrastructure At Seoul's ICN10

headline: Digital Realty Delivers Colocation Infrastructure Support to Samsung Electronics in Seoul
summary: SEOUL, South Korea, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the world’s largest cloud- and carrier-neutral data center platform, today announced that it is providing enterprise-grade data center infrastructure to Samsung Electronics at its ICN10 data center in Seoul. Through this engagement, Digital Realty is supporting Samsung Electronics’ enterprise IT operations by delivering stable and scalable colocation infrastructure.
